projectDescription: A lightweight Minecraft Fabric server mod that replaces the keyword 'mypos' in chat with the sending player's current coordinates.
keyFeatures: Replaces 'mypos' keyword in chat with the player's current X, Y, Z coordinates
Supports exact match (private coordinate message) and inline substitution in chat messages
Server-side only — no client mod required
Zero-config: works out of the box with no setup after installation
Lightweight and focused — does exactly one thing
publicApiSurface: Chat keyword: mypos (exact) — sends coordinates privately to the sender
Chat keyword: mypos (inline) — broadcasts message with coordinates substituted inline
